6. Get information for a vulnerability (vendor name and product name)
Returns full details about a specific vulnerability, by vendor name and product name.
Base Command
vulndb-get-vuln-by-vendor-and-product-name
Input
Argument Name

!vulndb-get-updates-by-dates-or-hours start_date="2015-10-27T04:27:22" end_date="2017-10-27T04:27:22" max_size="20"
6. Get information for a vulnerability (vendor name and product name)
Returns full details about a specific vulnerability, by vendor name and product name.
Base Command
vulndb-get-vuln-by-vendor-and-product-name
Input
Argument Name
Description
name: vulndb-get-vuln-by-vendor-and-product-name

outputs.description: CVE (constant string). VulnDB.CvssMetrics.Id CVSS reference value.
outputs.name: VulnDB.CVE-ExtReferences.Value

outputs.description: CVSS access vector. VulnDB.CvssMetrics.AccessComplexity CVSS access complexity.
outputs.name: VulnDB.CvssMetrics.AccessVector

outputs.description: CVSS metric authentication. VulnDB.CvssMetrics.ConfidentialityImpact CVSS confidentiality impact.
outputs.name: VulnDB.CvssMetrics.Authentication

outputs.description: CVSS integrity impact. VulnDB.CvssMetrics.AvailabilityImpact CVSS availability impact.
outputs.name: VulnDB.cvssMetrics.integrity_impact

outputs.description: Product names. VulnDB.Products.Versions.Id Product version IDs.
outputs.name: VulnDB.Products.Name
